name: Soft #t Moist Nut Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the cottage cheese, sour cream, sugar, and applesauce.
3. Add the yeast, cinnamon, baking soda, and salt to the wet ingredients.
4. Gradually mix in the flour until well combined.
5. Stir in the walnuts and raisins (if using).
6. Grease a 9x5 inch loaf pan with cooking spray.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning off the heat and transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
